# AuthorizationManager

Reach these methods through the `authorization` field on `dev.unofficialbox.Client`.
Each is a **blocking** call returning its value directly and throwing
`dev.unofficialbox.runtime.Runtime.BoxApiException` on failure.

`GET /authorize`

| Parameter | In | Type | Required |
|---|---|---|---|
| `response_type` | query | `GetAuthorizeResponseType` | yes |
| `client_id` | query | `String` | yes |
| `redirect_uri` | query | `String` | no |
| `state` | query | `String` | no |
| `scope` | query | `String` | no |

**Returns:** text (`String`)
